class.name: StatsComponent
class.brief_description: Component managing core role-playing attributes and status calculations for an entity.
class.description: [StatsComponent] handles the storage, modification, and evaluation of core entity stats (Strength, Agility, Vitality, Endurance). It acts as a standalone data provider decoupled from other game systems. It utilizes an external [StatsBalanceConfig] resource to extract formula multipliers dynamically. When any base stat or configuration changes, it fires the [signal stats_changed] signal, allowing dependent, isolated nodes (such as a [code]HealthComponent[/code]) to recalculate their states instantly.

method.name: get_agility
method.description: Returns the current base Agility value.

method.name: get_balance_config
method.description: Returns the assigned [StatsBalanceConfig] resource. Returns [code]null[/code] if no configuration is attached.

method.name: get_endurance
method.description: Returns the current base Endurance value.

method.name: get_strength
method.description: Returns the current base Strength value.

method.name: get_vitality
method.description: Returns the current base Vitality value.

method.name: set_agility
method.description: Sets a new base value for Agility. The value is clamped internally to a minimum of 1 ([code]std::max(1, value)[/code]). Emits the [signal stats_changed] signal.

method.name: set_balance_config
method.description: Attaches a [StatsBalanceConfig] resource to recalculate secondary attribute formulas at runtime. Emits the [signal stats_changed] signal.

method.name: set_endurance
method.description: Sets a new base value for Endurance. The value is clamped internally to a minimum of 1. Emits the [signal stats_changed] signal.

method.name: set_strength
method.description: Sets a new base value for Strength. The value is clamped internally to a minimum of 1. Emits the [signal stats_changed] signal.

method.name: set_vitality
method.description: Sets a new base value for Vitality. The value is clamped internally to a minimum of 1. Emits the [signal stats_changed] signal.

members.member: The entity's Agility. Governs secondary computations such as evasion chance and critical strike probability. Cannot drop below 1.
The resource holding balance coefficients. Allows tweaking RPG formulas inside the Godot Inspector without C++ recompilation. If unassigned, hardcoded fallback constants are applied.
The entity's Endurance. Directly dictates the percentage of incoming flat physical damage reduction. Cannot drop below 1.
The entity's Strength. Used by combat calculations to scale physical attack power bonuses. Cannot drop below 1.
The entity's Vitality. The baseline multiplier used by health systems to determine maximum health scaling. Cannot drop below 1.

signal.name: stats_changed
signal.description: Emitted whenever a core attribute value updates or a new [code]balance_config[/code] resource is set. Notifies listening systems to refresh cached attributes or recalibrate metrics.
